steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from math import isfinite

price = 9.96
shares_outstanding = 2977112191  # total shares outstanding (issued - treasury)
# Financials (2024-12-31) in BRL
assets_total = 57384156000.0
cash = 4161939000.0
investments = 632000.0
cn_total_fc = cash + investments
# Debt components
short_term_loans = 3256315000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (circulante)
long_term_loans = 13989844000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (não circulante)
debentures = 3920000000.0
gross_debt = short_term_loans + long_term_loans + debentures
net_debt = gross_debt - cn_total_fc
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
EV = market_cap + net_debt

# Income statement / P&L for the year 2024 (12m)
revenues_vendas = 22651036000.0
receita_outras = 1373033000.0
receita_constr_proprios = 2631688000.0
# total revenue (approx 12m)
receita_liquida_12m = revenues_vendas + receita_outras + receita_constr_proprios
cost_of_goods_sold = 17759792000.0
# gross profit
gross_profit = receita_liquida_12m - cost_of_goods_sold
# Operating expenses
despesas_vendas = 137121000.0
despesas_gerais_adm = 825350000.0
outras_receitas_operacionais = 367957000.0
outras_despesas_operacionais = -513684000.0
resultados_equivalencia = 281202000.0
operating_expenses = despesas_vendas + despesas_gerais_adm + outras_despesas_operacionais
# EBIT approximated as given in data
EBIT = 4064248000.0
# We will compute EBITDA as EBIT + deprec/amor
deprec_amort = 1465478000.0
EBITDA = EBIT + deprec_amort
# Interest and taxes
resultado_financeiro = -1157014000.0
imposto_renda = -599435000.0
# Net income (consolidated)
net_income = 2799370000.0
# Balance sheet items for equity and assets
patrimonio_liquido = 25636935000.0
# For margins and ratios
current_assets = 13041808000.0
current_liabilities = 10342380000.0
atcirc_liqu = 13041808000.0
passivo_circulante = 10342380000.0
rett = receita_liquida_12m

# Shares and per-share metrics
LPA = net_income / shares_outstanding
VPA = patrimonio_liquido / shares_outstanding

#margins
gross_margin = gross_profit / receita_liquida_12m
operating_margin = EBIT / receita_liquida_12m
net_margin = net_income / receita_liquida_12m

# ratios
EBIT_to_asset = EBIT / assets_total
ROIC = EBIT / (assets_total - long_term_loans - 0)  # approximate (no suppliers here); adjust later
ROE = net_income / patrimonio_liquido

net_working_capital = current_assets - passivo_circulante
liquidez_corr = net_working_capital / passivo_circulante
Giro_ativos = receita_liquida_12m / assets_total
Div_br_patrim = gross_debt / patrimonio_liquido
Giro_ativos = round(Giro_ativos, 6)

# per-share revenue, assets, etc
rev_per_share = receita_liquida_12m / shares_outstanding
assets_per_share = assets_total / shares_outstanding
wc_per_share = net_working_capital / shares_outstanding

PSR = price / rev_per_share
PVP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / shares_outstanding)
P_L = price / LPA
P_Ativos = price / assets_per_share
P_CapGiro = price / wc_per_share
P_AtvCircLiq = price / wc_per_share

# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT

results = {
    'Dív.Bruta': gross_debt,
    'Disponibilidades': cn_total_fc,
    'Dív.Líquida': net_debt,
    'Ativo Total': assets_total,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Patrimônio Líquido Consolidado': patrimonio_liquido,
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': receita_liquida_12m,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': EBIT,
    'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)': net_income,
    'LPA': LPA,
    'VPA': VPA,
    'Marg. Bruta': gross_margin,
    'Marg. EBIT': operating_margin,
    'Marg. Líquida': net_margin,
    'EBIT / Ativo': EBIT_to_asset,
    'ROIC': ROIC,
    'ROE': ROE,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': Div_br_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': Giro_ativos,
    'PSR': PSR,
    'P/L': P_L,
    'P/VP': PVP,
    'P/EBIT': P_EBIT,
    'P/Ativos': P_Ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': P_CapGiro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': P_AtvCircLiq,
    'EV / EBITDA': EV_EBITDA,
    'EV / EBIT': EV_EBIT,
    'LPA': LPA,
    'VPA': VPA
}

# print neatly
for k,v in results.items():
    if isinstance(v, float):
        if 'Marg.' in k or k=='ROIC' or k=='ROE' or k=='Liquidez Corr' or k=='Giro Ativos' or k=='Div Br/ Patrim' or k=='P/L' or k=='P/VP' or k=='P/EBIT' or k=='PSR' or k=='P/Ativos' or k=='P/Cap. Giro' or k=='P/Ativ Circ Liq' or k=='EBIT / Ativo':
            pass
    # just print at end

print("Dívida Bruta:", round(gross_debt,2))
print("Dívida Líquida:", round(net_debt,2))
print("Ativo Total:", round(assets_total,2))
print("Receita Líquida (12 meses):", round(receita_liquida_12m,2))
print("EBIT (12 meses):", round(EBIT,2))
print("EBITDA:", round(EBITDA,2))
print("Lucro Líquido (12 meses):", round(net_income,2))
print("LPA:", round(LPA,4))
print("VPA:", round(VPA,2))
print("Marg Bruta:", round(gross_margin*100, 2), "%")
print("Marg EBIT:", round(operating_margin*100, 2), "%")
print("Marg Líquida:", round(net_margin*100, 2), "%")
print("EBIT / Ativo:", round(EBIT_to_asset*100, 2), "%")
print("ROIC:", round(ROIC*100, 2), "%")
print("ROE:", round(ROE*100, 2), "%")
print("Liquidez Corr:", round(liquidez_corr,4))
print("Div Br/ Patrim:", round(Div_br_patrim,4))
print("Giro Ativos:", round(Giro_ativos,4))
print("PSR:", round(PSR,4))
print("P/L:", round(P_L,4))
print("P/VP:", round(PVP,4))
print("P/EBIT:", round(P_EBIT,4))
print("P/Ativos:", round(P_Ativos,4))
print("P/Cap. Giro:", round(P_CapGiro,4))
print("P/Ativ Circ Liq:", round(P_AtvCircLiq,4))
print("EV / EBITDA:", round(EV_EBITDA,4))
print("EV / EBIT:", round(EV_EBIT,4))
# print 3m indicators as N/A
print("Receita Líquida (3 meses): N/A")
print("EBIT (3 meses): N/A")
print("Lucro Líquido (3 meses): N/A")

"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Recompute with fixed gross_profit
price = 9.96
shares_outstanding = 2977112191

# Balance sheet 2024-12-31
assets_total = 57384156000.0
current_assets = 13041808000.0
current_liabilities = 10342380000.0
cash = 4161939000.0
investments = 632000.0
investments_total = cash + investments
net_cash = investments_total
long_term_loans = 13989844000.0
short_term_loans = 3256315000.0
debentures = 3920000000.0
gross_debt = long_term_loans + short_term_loans + debentures
net_debt = gross_debt - net_cash
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
EV = market_cap + net_debt

# Income 12m
revenue_bev = 22651036000.0
receita_outras = 1373033000.0
receita_constr = 2631688000.0
revenue_total = revenue_bev + receita_outras + receita_constr
cost_of_goods = 17759792000.0
gross_profit = 4898040000.0
EBIT = 4064248000.0
deprec_amort = 1465478000.0
EBITDA = EBIT + deprec_amort
net_income = 2799370000.0

patrim_liq = 25636935000.0
outstanding = shares_outstanding
LPA = net_income / outstanding
VPA = pat_liq / outstanding

gross_margin = gross_profit / revenue_total
oper_margin = EBIT / revenue_total
net_margin = net_income / revenue_total
EBIT_to_asset = EBIT / assets_total
ROIC = EBIT / (assets_total - long_term_loans - 0)
ROE = net_income / pat_liq
working_capital = current_assets - current_liabilities
liquidity = working_capital / current_liabilities
Giro = revenue_total / assets_total

rev_per_share = revenue_total / outstanding
assets_per_share = assets_total / outstanding
wc_per_share = working_capital / outstanding
PSR = price / rev_per_share
PVP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / outstanding)
P_L = price / LPA
P_Ativos = price / assets_per_share
P_CapGiro = price / wc_per_share
P_AtvCircLiq = price / wc_per_share
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA

print("Dív Bruta:", round(gross_debt,0))
print("Dív Líquida:", round(net_debt,0))
print("Receita Líquida (12 meses):", revenue_total)
print("EBIT (12 meses):", EBIT)
print("EBITDA:", EBITDA)
print("Lucro Líquido (12 meses):", net_income)
print("LPA:", round(LPA,4))
print("VPA:", round(VPA,2))
print("Marg Bruta:", round(gross_margin*100,2), "%")
print("Marg EBIT:", round(oper_margin*100,2), "%")
print("Marg Líquida:", round(net_margin*100,2), "%")
print("EBIT / Ativo:", round(EBIT_to_asset*100,2), "%")
print("ROIC:", round(ROIC*100,2), "%")
print("ROE:", round(ROE*100,2), "%")
print("Liquidez Corr:", round(liquidity,4))
print("Div Br/ Patrim:", round(gross_debt/pat_liq,4))
print("Giro Ativos:", round(Giro,4))
print("PSR:", round(PSR,4))
print("P/L:", round(P_L,4))
print("P/VP:", round(PVP,4))
print("P/EBIT:", round(P_EBIT,4))
print("P/Ativos:", round(P_Ativos,4))
print("P/Cap.Giro:", round(P_CapGiro,4))
print("P/Ativ Circ Liq:", round(P_AtvCircLiq,4))
print("EV / EBITDA:", round(EV_EBITDA,4))
print("EV / EBIT:", round(EV_EBIT,4))

"} }

EV = market_cap + net_debt

receita_constr = 2631688000.0

VPA = patri_liq / outstanding

# margins

net_margin = net_income / revenue_total
EBIT_to_asset = EBIT / assets_total

ROE = net_income / patri_liq

current_assets = 13041808000.0
passivo_circulante = 10342380000.0
net_working_capital = current_assets - passivo_circulante
liquidity = net_working_capital / passivo_circulante

wc_per_share = net_working_capital / outstanding

print("Receita Líquida (3 meses): N/A")
"} }
